name: repeat_question_guard
notes: The owner answers a question; the next turns must never re-ask the same substance (record-and-move-on). Setup: fresh onboarding tenant, journey ACTIVE with a pre-seeded queue — `setup --owner-inputs true --journey` (VT-582 calibration fix: a bare `setup` with no --journey creates no onboarding_journey row at all, so the journey never intercepts and this scenario can't probe the walker's record-and-move-on behavior). 'Hi' re-presents the pending confirm without recording it (bare-greeting guard); the multi-field answer records against whichever field is current; step 3 checks nothing already-given gets re-asked.

steps.message: We are Probe Traders, a hardware shop in Pune
steps.note: Multi-field answer: name + type + city in one message.
NO re-asking any of the three facts just given.
